description:
Join us on Tuesday, July 14th from 4-8 PM at Whispering Vine Fourth Street for an evening of Oakville wines from Groth paired with a flatbread included with the tasting. Before Oakville became an appellation, Groth's estate vineyard grew from a family dream, neighborhood friendship, and a leap of faith. Today, Ted Henry continues Groth's vine-to-bottle focus as Head Winemaker and Director of Winegrowing while bringing new precision to farming and winemaking.

Tasting Fee: $45 (includes tasting and flatbread)

With Special Guest:

Ted Henry, Head Winemaker and Director of Winegrowing

Reserve your Spot

Featured Wines:

  • Groth Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon 2022 - Oakville estate Cabernet with black cherry, loamy earth, plush new-oak texture, and a long, velvety finish.
  • Groth Oakcross 2020 - Polished and velvety, with deep blackberry and blueberry fruit, cinnamon, clove, and full Oakville structure.
  • Groth Cabernet Sauvignon 2022 - A streamlined, silky Oakville Cabernet built on black cherry, subtle cedar, Merlot, Petit Verdot, and fresh structure.
  • Groth Oakville Estate Sauvignon Blanc 2023 - Crisp and clean, showing peach, tangerine, lemon curd, wet stone, white pepper, and bright citrus lift.

Experience the range of Groth's Oakville estate wines, from bright Sauvignon Blanc to age-worthy Cabernet.
title: Flights & Flatbread with Groth
